Est. Toronto · Revolving Sushi Bar

YAMATO

Japanese Restaurant

Scroll

Our Story

Crafted with Heart,
Served with Skill

Located in the heart of Toronto's theatre district, Yamato has been a celebrated destination for Japanese cuisine since the nineties. We are committed to creating exquisite Japanese delicacies — our sushi is meticulously executed, supremely fresh, and punctuated with welcome surprises.

01

Revolving Sushi Bar

An immersive dining experience where fresh, handcrafted pieces glide by — choose what delights you, at your own pace.

02

Supremely Fresh

From Atlantic salmon to prized bluefin toro, every piece of seafood is selected for quality and prepared the same day.

03

Theatre District

Steps from Roy Thomson Hall and TIFF Bell Lightbox — the perfect setting for a pre-show dinner or a special occasion.

The Menu

Traditional & Neo-Modern Japanese

From delicate nigiri and sashimi to char-broiled teriyaki, hot pot Nabemono, and udon noodle soups — our kitchen spans the full range of Japanese culinary tradition.

About Us

Japanese Restaurant · Toronto Theatre District

Located in the heart of Toronto's theatre district, Yamato has been operating since the nineties — a quiet institution built on craft and consistency.

Our team at the revolving sushi bar

We are committed to creating exquisite Japanese delicacies. Our assortment of sushi is meticulously executed, supremely fresh, and punctuated with welcome surprises that keep guests returning season after season.

Whether you prefer the classical elegance of traditional Japanese cuisine or the bold expression of neo-modern dishes, every plate is prepared with our heart and skills — to satisfy your love of quality Japanese food.

Our revolving sushi bar is a beloved centrepiece: a living procession of handcrafted pieces that invites discovery, conversation, and the pleasure of eating at your own pace.

🎋

Tradition

Rooted in classical Japanese technique, refined over decades of practice in the heart of Toronto.

🐟

Freshness

Every piece of fish and seafood is selected daily for peak quality — no exceptions, no shortcuts.

🏮

Atmosphere

A warm, distinctive environment designed for lingering over good food and good company.

Environment

A Space Designed for the Senses

The Atmosphere

Where Every Detail
Is Considered

The environment at Yamato is as carefully composed as the food. Warm tones, natural materials, and thoughtful lighting create a space that is both intimate and lively — the perfect backdrop for exceptional Japanese cuisine.

The Revolving Bar

The heart of Yamato — a continuous procession of handcrafted sushi, gliding past at a gentle pace.

Dining Room

Warm, thoughtfully lit tables for intimate dinners, celebrations, and pre-show gatherings.

The Bar

A full bar of premium sake, spirits and Japanese whisky — the perfect start to your evening.

Private Booths

Intimate curved booths designed for celebrations, business dinners, and special occasions.

The Entrance

A striking descent into the dining room — the first impression of Yamato's distinctive design.

Sushi, Delivered by Boat

Each handcrafted plate arrives by its own miniature wooden boat, gliding along the bar.
